snapshot.title: EU AI Act Baseline Snapshot
snapshot.description: Baseline policy registry for the EU AI Act flagship build, tracking binding law, official guidance, and related implementation materials.

fragments.heading: Prohibited AI practices
fragments.body: Establishes categories of AI practices that are prohibited in the Union, including certain manipulative, exploitative, social scoring, and biometric uses.

fragments.heading: Classification rules for high-risk AI systems
fragments.body: Defines when AI systems fall into the Act's high-risk category, including product-linked cases and Annex III standalone use cases.

fragments.heading: Transparency obligations
fragments.body: Requires specific transparency measures for certain AI interactions and generated content, such as informing people when they interact with AI in covered scenarios.

fragments.heading: Phased application timeline
fragments.body: Explains the staged application of the AI Act, including dates for prohibitions, GPAI duties, and the broader main obligations.

fragments.heading: Standards and conformity support
fragments.body: Describes the role of harmonised standards and implementation support materials for demonstrating compliance with relevant AI Act obligations.
